framework.name: Verifiable Intent Cryptographic Audit Trail
framework.description: Mastercard+Google's mechanism: links consumer identity, original instructions, and transaction outcome into a single tamper-resistant record using Selective Disclosure. Built on FIDO, EMVCo, IETF, W3C standards. Open-sourced at verifiableintent.dev, announced March 5, 2026.
framework.raw_quote: creates tamper-resistant proof of consumer authorization for every transaction executed by an AI agent. It links three elements into a single immutable record: the consumer's identity, their original instructions, and the outcome of the transaction.

source.title: What Is Mastercard Verifiable Intent? Agentic Commerce Trust Layer ...
